summary: Multiple Gradle tasks checking Kotlin plugin configuration are failing across 7 modules (spring-boot, spring-boot-test, spring-boot-resttestclient, spring-boot-jpa-test, spring-boot-kotlinx-serialization-json, spring-boot-docs, spring-boot-smoke-test-webflux-coroutines), suggesting a Kotlin Gradle plugin configuration problem. Secondary docker cleanup errors are also present.
root_cause: Kotlin Gradle plugin configuration validation errors across multiple modules, detected by checkKotlinGradlePluginConfigurationErrors tasks. The specific configuration issues are not visible in the truncated output, but the failure pattern is consistent across 7 distinct modules.

evidence.reason: Gradle task named checkKotlinGradlePluginConfigurationErrors is explicitly failing; the task name indicates Kotlin plugin configuration validation
Same task type failing in the core module, indicating a widespread configuration issue not limited to one module
Pattern repeats across module subproject, reinforcing that this is a configuration problem affecting multiple modules consistently
Job reports 12 distinct errors; the truncated checkKotlinGradlePluginConfigurationErrors tasks account for 7 of them

suggested_fix: Verify the Kotlin Gradle plugin configuration in build.gradle or build.gradle.kts files across affected modules. Check for incompatibilities between the Kotlin version, Gradle version, and plugin version. Run `gradle checkKotlinGradlePluginConfigurationErrors` locally to see full error details (the CI log truncates them).
